leadText: Honey Gather (Japanese: みつあつめ Honey Gather) is an Ability introduced in Generation IV. Prior to Generation V, it was the signature Ability of Combee.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Honey Gather has no effect during battle. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] After winning a battle, any Pokémon in the player's party with Honey Gather that is not already holding an item may collect Honey , similar to Pickup , even if it did not participate in the battle and/or cannot battle . The chance for a Pokémon with this Ability to pick up Honey depends on its level, starting at 5% if the Pokémon is between levels 1 and 10, and going up by 5% every ten levels, ending at a 50% chance at levels 91-100.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Honey Gather has no effect during battle.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD T D S Improves the chances of finding Nectar in Treasure Boxes. B S L たからばこから おいしいミツが でやすくなる MD GtI Unavailable S MD When the Pokémon goes to a different floor, it may pick up Nectar! But if it is already holding an item, it won't pick up anything.
